    508.Origin_Intro_Laezel: That's my strapping girl. Burning hot - but not too hot, praise Withers.END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellKarlachEPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Laezel

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: cbe63554-a3c6-ff15-6852-dc43c9670b45Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h814533a2g2d93g42c0gabeagb60d875fc8d6Text UUID: 8a90af94-50a0-41af-a9e3-30fa56be5c1eTimeline Phase Index: 2Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cbe63554-a3c6-ff15-6852-dc43c9670b45Timeline Phase Duration: 60.59sTimeline Phase Shots: 7Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      497.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It's incredible, isn't it? To be anywhere but sizzling in the hottest of Hells.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c97042fa-1a6e-f1de-a491-eb80b049fde5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hb9d1712fgc2d8g4f40g9b74gc785e718c707Text UUID: b65f150a-8c61-426d-a8ba-79c3a234030bGroup ID: cbe63554-a3c6-ff15-6852-dc43c9670b45Group Index: 1
      • +
        345.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I've slaughtered more fiends in the last month than I thought swarmed the whole of Avernus.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8b767c24-49df-3837-aaa6-4bf8fdba197dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h1b413256gf424g4cbaga222ge6818b28b808Text UUID: cbfc4189-4f22-43ef-9794-185c11882934Group ID: cbe63554-a3c6-ff15-6852-dc43c9670b45Group Index: 2
        • +
          464.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And still you best me at every turn. I could build a fortress the size of Castle Susurrus with all the horns you've ripped from rampaging orthons.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b8488e22-041c-4e36-8100-4ae985540762Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h4a4de1dfgb770g4d12g9f2ag74b16c713177Text UUID: 5c9acaae-ef46-4ebd-ba0a-92c8cf65f417Group ID: cbe63554-a3c6-ff15-6852-dc43c9670b45Group Index: 3
          • +
            331.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It's time - you deserve your freedom from the fires. I can't believe it's almost in reach.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 849998b0-5c37-aaf3-3cb0-c23b7beafdeeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h770cb845g92fag46ccg8851g18518eb270e6Text UUID: 463af24a-9ea0-493f-906f-75510a7c5132Group ID: cbe63554-a3c6-ff15-6852-dc43c9670b45Group Index: 4
            • +
              153.Narrator: *You think back on the cambion you slayed a tenday ago. It carried a map with directions and blueprints for Zariel's own, private forge.*

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 41a3c12a-c4b3-27dc-f28b-ec049606cf4bSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h07f230a5gf3cdg49bagb5d1g654309b65811Text UUID: 571540f6-3acc-42cc-b5de-4ae87c0ff96eGroup ID: cbe63554-a3c6-ff15-6852-dc43c9670b45Group Index: 5
              • +
                493.Narrator: *The current plan: sneak in, grab a smith, and force him to repair or replace your heart so you can live outside Avernus.*

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c6b97ad7-ef47-4cc8-51c0-10064b8d7087Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h856c35a6g4a46g41fdgafc7g08ce347f64b6Text UUID: f0e35d0f-9ac3-4c19-bd55-8901ab2ee6feGroup ID: cbe63554-a3c6-ff15-6852-dc43c9670b45Group Index: 6
                • +

                  • +
                    362.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Dear Karlach. I thought slicing through the wings of a pit fiend would be the pinnacle of my month.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9393585c-7280-1839-b012-b058d826ed7cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hf8ccba33gf004g40c9g84edg8ee408752f18Text UUID: bcc16ad3-f0da-4e70-b4be-15c2b8195078Timeline Phase Index: 239Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9393585c-7280-1839-b012-b058d826ed7cTimeline Phase Duration: 29.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 9393585c-7280-1839-b012-b058d826ed7cGroup Index: 0
                    • +
                      273.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But seeing you here tonight, your eyes so bright, your smile so wide - nothing could bring me more joy than that.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6e5c81f5-ed88-6d14-0460-7ef93e352a55Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h0fcf2e01gfa87g4b39gb1dcge5e45f152722Text UUID: 41d73694-f2ef-420c-b92b-63f7a369887aGroup ID: 9393585c-7280-1839-b012-b058d826ed7cGroup Index: 1
                      • +
                        598.Origin_Intro_Laezel: My story is yours now, Karlach. It may never be written in the githyanki slates, but it will be legendary all the same.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f00e05cb-f5cb-677d-7905-8b0c9dca2d85Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha538e73fg3696g4247g98acg97955ad3aadcText UUID: a74991f5-e92c-4c1e-966f-bf658f55afb3Group ID: 9393585c-7280-1839-b012-b058d826ed7cGroup Index: 2

                  • +
                    209.Origin_Intro_Laezel: My hopes are only ever as strong as the woman standing before me now.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5875bc13-162c-03f7-190e-27daf1f21390Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h9aabe046g3a9bg49dag82ddgee727857411eText UUID: 9b516258-3543-4276-9429-5c598b6fdf96Timeline Phase Index: 273Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5875bc13-162c-03f7-190e-27daf1f21390Timeline Phase Duration: 18.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 5875bc13-162c-03f7-190e-27daf1f21390Group Index: 0
                    • +
                      346.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Maybe there's no forge. Maybe we find a party of pit fiends or a hundred chain devils waiting for us. So what? We'll slice them into chunks like all the others.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8c205041-6001-0e4e-d3e9-df58a0af9541Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h30b4714bg9c19g4ff3g9fbfg024759ffc84aText UUID: 6a4a0dc2-ceb5-4082-bce4-66895e2d3422Group ID: 5875bc13-162c-03f7-190e-27daf1f21390Group Index: 1
                      • +
                        412.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And then we carry on through the fires until we see blue sky again.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a792eedf-c74a-53ca-554f-faa24a6e6522Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hea868620gb28dg41acga8acgbf2c5b01cb0bText UUID: 08bc5ae6-2a62-4d37-951a-22a05a0cda11Timeline Phase Index: 232Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a792eedf-c74a-53ca-554f-faa24a6e6522Timeline Phase Duration: 19sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: a792eedf-c74a-53ca-554f-faa24a6e6522Group Index: 0
                        • +
                          257.Origin_Intro_Laezel: My story is yours now, Karlach. It may never be written in the githyanki slates, but it will be legendary all the same. No matter how it ends.

                          Metadata

                            • +
                              260.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Xan is safe - don't you worry that horned head of yours.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 695c7c72-c037-de58-6e8b-591662cfee77Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h00b38696g66d0g474ega2c6g15cc03f5a5b0Text UUID: b5e1fc11-f813-472c-a81b-6bbd484ec6d9Timeline Phase Index: 292Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 695c7c72-c037-de58-6e8b-591662cfee77Timeline Phase Duration: 23.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 695c7c72-c037-de58-6e8b-591662cfee77Group Index: 0
                              • +
                                248.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Besides, if anyone so much as looked at him funny, I know you'd turn them to bloodchunks.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 67a007cc-a2da-22f7-90e6-9e10ac80db19Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h0a486653g54a7g426egbe58g3c6b61609d7bText UUID: 2c42e174-76e3-4fa6-a06d-a4bad9c00497Group ID: 695c7c72-c037-de58-6e8b-591662cfee77Group Index: 1
                                • •
                                  319.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Something in his eyes tells me he'll take after you more than me. A hellshunter with a graceful soul and a burning heart. [End]

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8227f1d2-f5cf-8df8-fb6c-035102b1396cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha9ee3be1g063dg4e04gb89cgbff1e018bfb0Text UUID: 38c4544d-bb20-45f1-9f56-d7ee0a460b17End Node: TrueGroup ID: 695c7c72-c037-de58-6e8b-591662cfee77Group Index: 2

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 887f8be3-02bc-211f-5dd3-2ac435295224Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h21a8c677g49f4g4cc6gb078g54262a9f4107Text 1 UUID: 2dc29364-51bc-4c64-8f4b-f0ce85f77591Text 2 Handle: h0b295f5egd3e2g41f8g8d39g787266a9d67aText 2 UUID: b760b215-e69b-49d1-ab80-090b40ae2980Show Once: True
                  • +
                    85.Origin_Intro_Laezel: So maybe we find a party of pit fiends or a hundred chain devils waiting for us. We'll slice them into chunks like all the others.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 264f46e4-23fd-c674-ccbd-31b55c2bb56eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hf7f331c2g3e0fg4e67g9195ga5b608b898a9Text UUID: 75710516-2b54-415e-bc50-2d4b05757757Timeline Phase Index: 184Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 264f46e4-23fd-c674-ccbd-31b55c2bb56eTimeline Phase Duration: 8.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • See Node 412 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) And then we carry on through the fires until we see blue sky again.
  • -
    109.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Would you look at that. END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellEPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Laezel

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Laezel
    • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = True
    settype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • EPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Laezel {6e30cdaf-463b-6013-42c4-ff58e242793a} = True

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 30aa362c-938d-30c1-46ff-5f7e05256456Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h7d1b9ed1g2b7eg486agbdc9g3bbebadcf256Text UUID: 4d30178f-4c5d-4ff0-ba5e-a3aaa6b2ce9eTimeline Phase Index: 5Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 30aa362c-938d-30c1-46ff-5f7e05256456Timeline Phase Duration: 15.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      602.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I thought slicing through the wings of a pit fiend would be the pinnacle of my month -

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f0f9f505-50a7-70db-db00-bc41e1a5294eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: habc613c1g16c3g46b6g9291ga3a949b39d1fText UUID: 9fd40ccc-2e9b-48c5-8abf-113247e3e80eGroup ID: 30aa362c-938d-30c1-46ff-5f7e05256456Group Index: 1
      • +
        624.Origin_Intro_Laezel: - but seeing you brings me more pleasure than gutting every last hellfiend of Avernus.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fb74fda6-22ce-0844-522a-7478e94c89e6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hfb2210b3g3c83g4bd0g97ddgfb99bfdf8241Text UUID: 1145db09-4920-4e47-bfe4-5553784a69e0Group ID: 30aa362c-938d-30c1-46ff-5f7e05256456Group Index: 2
        • +
          595.Player: Do you regret turning from Orpheus' cause and joining Karlach in the Hells?Full-IllithidORI_Laezel_State_IsOnOrpheusPath

          Flags and Tags

          ruletagtype rule
          • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

          Text

          Variant 1

          combine=0
          • Full-Illithid
          Do you regret turning from Orpheus' cause and joining Karlach in the Hells?
          hf76a331cg8e32g483eg95a2g277d6e149ee2 | fc2d8406-0e12-4fe2-8f32-be5ef6a2210c | stub

          Variant 2

          Do you regret turning from Orpheus' cause and joining Karlach in the Hells?
          h27dd5e0bgad36g4136ga2f2g3c6f365aa298 | 2bbe9594-d8ce-4dc7-a7b5-56fdce390076 | stub

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ef8506d2-5417-2ac1-859a-36a94b58120fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hf76a331cg8e32g483eg95a2g277d6e149ee2Text 1 UUID: fc2d8406-0e12-4fe2-8f32-be5ef6a2210cText 2 Handle: h27dd5e0bgad36g4136ga2f2g3c6f365aa298Text 2 UUID: 2bbe9594-d8ce-4dc7-a7b5-56fdce390076Show Once: True
          • +
            301.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Never.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7a9a14f7-1448-d3bb-af21-ee4a3d0764efSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h903a7684gc0e5g4f8cg9305gd998d683bb7dText UUID: 3702fd5b-0ea0-4c9d-abea-bfdf83d4b7bdTimeline Phase Index: 148Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7a9a14f7-1448-d3bb-af21-ee4a3d0764efTimeline Phase Duration: 1.7sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • +
              69.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I couldn't wish for a life more furious, more bloody, and more fitting for a gith warrior - or a battle partner as mighty as Karlach.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1fc12229-d98c-2ab9-574b-c948983d0512Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8d1d1c48ga81cg4c34gbc3dgabff6d87a4a0Text UUID: 48295d5b-d88e-4def-b108-e0e228ea4d9cTimeline Phase Index: 196Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1fc12229-d98c-2ab9-574b-c948983d0512Timeline Phase Duration: 45.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 1fc12229-d98c-2ab9-574b-c948983d0512Group Index: 0
              • +
                467.Origin_Intro_Laezel: She bests me at every turn. I could build a fortress the size of Castle Susurrus with all the horns she's ripped from rampaging orthons.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b94d94e2-60d0-cfda-9511-a3a29670b484Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h2f3fa59cg1c76g4ab2gb773gc4cb5a178c55Text UUID: 734f0f0d-b1c8-4924-9880-74ad81e31dd8Group ID: 1fc12229-d98c-2ab9-574b-c948983d0512Group Index: 1
                • +
                  474.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But Avernus may not be her forever home. There's a chance - well, you should speak with her yourself, if you haven't already.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bdc68376-ee52-07b4-224a-2354531b6668Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha959989ag744bg40c6g8ea6g095ea778e2bbText UUID: 79fbf75a-b708-40df-93d0-0f1580c2829bGroup ID: 1fc12229-d98c-2ab9-574b-c948983d0512Group Index: 2
                  • +
                    8.Origin_Intro_Laezel: My story is Karlach's now. It may never be written in the githyanki slates, but it will be legendary all the same.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 03574f47-7a88-8a79-74dd-9dde791949f2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hbb111d00g1bbfg4199g8222g1da3ca8a1095Text UUID: c80309e2-0670-43f5-81f4-214b6d2c48dbGroup ID: 1fc12229-d98c-2ab9-574b-c948983d0512Group Index: 3
                    • +
                      267.Player: And what of the egg you took? Has it hatched?Full-IllithidEPI_Epilogue_State_EndedGameWithGithEgg

                      Flags and Tags

                      ruletagtype rule
                      • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}
                      checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Laezel
                      • EPI_Epilogue_State_EndedGameWithGithEgg {8116a680-d8a2-4dd5-a281-ebd2705257f1} = True

                      Text

                      Variant 1

                      combine=0
                      • Full-Illithid
                      And what of the egg you took? Has it hatched?
                      h5cc06e44ge1ebg49beg831ag1b46885e7cc1 | 849f62dc-d686-40fd-ac5e-9b17924196d9 | stub

                      Variant 2

                      And what of the egg you took? Has it hatched?
                      hd38321b7gfd4bg422bg910ag48f12539ce68 | 38754479-843b-4237-af84-d04af62ee30e | stub

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6ba0b6b9-4f0f-1f11-f0aa-73d241a9c748Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h5cc06e44ge1ebg49beg831ag1b46885e7cc1Text 1 UUID: 849f62dc-d686-40fd-ac5e-9b17924196d9Text 2 Handle: hd38321b7gfd4bg422bg910ag48f12539ce68Text 2 UUID: 38754479-843b-4237-af84-d04af62ee30eShow Once: True
                      • +
                        231.Origin_Intro_Laezel: So it has - and a fine man the hatchling will be. I call him Xan. 'Freedom'.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5f29ebc5-fbdb-89a5-7a7e-0fa619baaf48Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hff9e618eg12e3g48c7g9965g5ae236ec7105Text UUID: 582cf32b-ff5d-4bf9-afc3-1d648ecbede9Timeline Phase Index: 291Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5f29ebc5-fbdb-89a5-7a7e-0fa619baaf48Timeline Phase Duration: 35.07sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 5f29ebc5-fbdb-89a5-7a7e-0fa619baaf48Group Index: 0
                        • +
                          340.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And before you ask, yes, he is safe. I keep him secure in a portable hole - and have torn new openings into every fiend that's wandered anywhere near.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 88879336-06dc-b473-2e56-5a5caaf90ecaSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: he86c8cdegc802g4915ga2c0g96aa201e0561Text UUID: e952fcc1-6472-4855-99e7-b8fa6481eeb2Group ID: 5f29ebc5-fbdb-89a5-7a7e-0fa619baaf48Group Index: 1
                          • +
                            292.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It won't be long before he's doing the tearing - if that's what he wishes.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 78181828-6f02-fd02-fc9f-ce0633343a2dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h2d6f3e7ag2e1bg4298g8933g72efdd9d4ee0Text UUID: c5424e75-d063-49c4-b639-67d1138a834cGroup ID: 5f29ebc5-fbdb-89a5-7a7e-0fa619baaf48Group Index: 2
                            • •
                              7.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I was afforded a destiny of my own choosing. When he comes of age, it is only right I give Xan the same. [End]

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 02f6c604-38f0-0814-079f-37e03a3b73daSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h86bd7f24g74afg49b8g927dg931623dec127Text UUID: 959fbf83-a111-444f-965b-a5476cad9550End Node: TrueGroup ID: 5f29ebc5-fbdb-89a5-7a7e-0fa619baaf48Group Index: 3
                    • •

            276.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I learned much from my time in Faerûn. Battle is more brutal - and the celebration after more glorious - with a fiery companion at your side.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6f6e6567-47e6-a854-7ed4-fc709fef6cbeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha96bd613gdba1g40eagb537ge42117b5d11cText UUID: 226b9966-83de-4a99-8e65-f735d27e7769Timeline Phase Index: 240Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6f6e6567-47e6-a854-7ed4-fc709fef6cbeTimeline Phase Duration: 11.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • See Node 69 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) I couldn't wish for a life more furious, more bloody, and more fitting for a gith warrior - or a battle partner as mighty as Karlach.
        • +

            204.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I'm glad to know it.

              101.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I learned much from my time with you in Faerûn. For instance, that battle is more brutal - and the celebration after more glorious - with a fiery companion at your side.

              433.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Well, like it or not, I learned much from my time with you in Faerûn. For instance, that battle is more brutal - and the celebration after more glorious - with a fiery companion at your side.

              Text

              Well, like it or not, I learned much from my time with you in Faerûn. For instance, that battle is more brutal - and the celebration after more glorious - with a fiery companion at your side.
              h2c7d52fegffc6g4ae3g8773g03e244a9ef96 | d9731735-951c-4f0c-b949-6e4fdf4437a7 | stub

    • +
      244.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Zhak vo'n'fynh duj. Scorching hot as ever - but not too hot, praise Withers.note: Confident, but softer than ever. She has been in service to Orpheus' cause, but happy to be here.ORI_State_PartneredWithLaezelKarlach

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
      • ORI_State_PartneredWithLaezel {d169a786-6e56-4f0d-a2eb-33c48d8d1160} = True

      • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a} = True

      51.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Duke Wyll Ravengard. Zhak vo'n'fynh duj.note: Confident, but softer than ever. She has been in service to Orpheus' cause, but happy to be here.GLO_Wyll_State_GrandDukeORI_State_PartneredWithLaezelWyll

          404.Origin_Intro_Laezel: For two months Orpheus trained me in the ways of the Comet. For two more I skewered kith'raki bellies. And for two more yet I travelled through Limbo.!END_General_State_OrpheusIsMindFlayer!END_General_State_OrpheusPermaDefeated

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global

                  402.Narrator: *Limbo, she'd said. A plane of chaos, where you might drink fire like water, where you might breathe ice instead of air -*125178bd-12c9-7e29-9dee-318794c058cb_PassedGithzerai

                            537.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Worth it, I'd say. I missed this place. This - ahem - 'Fay-run'.note: With a big smile. A reference to her misponunciation earlier in the game.

                            43.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Worth it, I'd say. I missed this place. This - ahem - 'Fay-run'.note: With a big smile. A reference to her misponunciation earlier in the game.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1527157f-a39a-afb4-e812-5715e7387586Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h596c8128gd49dg41cbg837fgfa2828677b39Text UUID: 903c9d83-cd25-4b15-99c7-c70227a8c681Timeline Phase Index: 218Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1527157f-a39a-afb4-e812-5715e7387586Timeline Phase Duration: 9.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                        • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd} = True

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a587fa1d-1a39-83b6-5ce6-942239959ac1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hb296bff9g79f8g4594g9f6ag10458945d542Text UUID: 28f3ae81-95a0-4f9b-9223-e0df1f72ad1cTimeline Phase Index: 61Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a587fa1d-1a39-83b6-5ce6-942239959ac1Timeline Phase Duration: 2.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                        • +
                          569.Narrator: *Shra'kt'lor. How well you know the name - the capital city of the githzerai, and the home of their immortal god-king, Zaerith Menyar-Ag-Gith.*

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e496951c-8b13-d657-3a83-0309774e537dSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: hbf3d0896g7de2g44f8g9840g2e596607227dText UUID: 9550e5df-d6d3-4061-bdff-18438061cefcTimeline Phase Index: 134Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e496951c-8b13-d657-3a83-0309774e537dTimeline Phase Duration: 12.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • +
                            179.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Our gish sent word of the rebellion to Menyar-Ag-Gith through the cosmos. He's agreed to parley.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4ca7fce3-e78a-dd01-4abb-e3b40fb0507aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hae2aa265g652cg44bdgb340gb7ad52fe8ccaText UUID: 8b4de7bc-b10f-4a5f-ac8d-879f0348d729Timeline Phase Index: 259Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4ca7fce3-e78a-dd01-4abb-e3b40fb0507aTimeline Phase Duration: 6.81sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                          230.Player: Shra'kt'lor? I've never heard of it. Should I have?Full-Illithid

                          Flags and Tags

                          ruletagtype rule
                          • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

                          • +
                            72.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I wouldn't expect you to. The capital city of the githzerai - an exiled people, once kin with mine until the madness of civil war ripped our one sky into two.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 20d6d22f-4c74-91dc-7d0c-d535f8ec4038Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h53519936gbc93g4b71g8fbeg7da899be3ae8Text UUID: 18b23682-b0fe-4e4e-8483-11861a403925Timeline Phase Index: 205Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 20d6d22f-4c74-91dc-7d0c-d535f8ec4038Timeline Phase Duration: 14.18sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                            • •

                        • +

                            186.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Zhak vo'n'fynh duj. No need to pretend - I know the word means little to you.ORI_State_PartneredWithLaezel

                            Flags and Tags

                            236.Origin_Intro_Laezel: No need to pretend - I know the word means little to you.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 60399314-eb6d-9922-293e-b38471af7c60Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h066ea103g4e7ag461dgb7d5g94aa8a7dcc03Text UUID: bb736724-f083-482d-a679-9f0fa7138f6aTimeline Phase Index: 281Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 60399314-eb6d-9922-293e-b38471af7c60Timeline Phase Duration: 5.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

                    • +

                      • +
                        238.Origin_Intro_Laezel: We've spilled blood, gained a foothold in the Astral. But still, we need allies. And one beyond reckoning has made itself known:

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6184b8e1-5743-fcb8-fd10-5322180297ffSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hb2f35dddg2702g4a54gaf07g0d9c7394ac2fText UUID: 1f9e041d-5b4c-45b0-9773-a116cbea7aa3Timeline Phase Index: 280Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6184b8e1-5743-fcb8-fd10-5322180297ffTimeline Phase Duration: 10.16sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                        • +
                          463.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Zaerith Menyar-Ag-Gith.Githyanki

                          Flags and Tags

                          checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                          • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd} = True

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b82b4e1b-b3c2-2c20-fd0f-38b539846c8aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha3a177d1g0c09g4ff3gb6dag6af4e2f1fe07Text UUID: a215b94a-580c-48e0-ae27-0e09c10c7f23Timeline Phase Index: 28Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b82b4e1b-b3c2-2c20-fd0f-38b539846c8aTimeline Phase Duration: 3.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • +
                            272.Narrator: *Zaerith Menyar-Ag-Gith. How well you know the name - the immortal god-king of the githzerai, and ruler of their capital, Shra'kt'lor.*

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6e30df3c-703e-e41b-3a20-00c32e39833cSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: hc752283fgba38g40b3gab03g4d1672c8d5ddText UUID: bd51dd37-a905-4fa2-9ff5-76bac7a6146bTimeline Phase Index: 229Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6e30df3c-703e-e41b-3a20-00c32e39833cTimeline Phase Duration: 13.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                            • +
                              246.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Our gish sent word of the rebellion to Menyar-Ag-Gith through the cosmos. He's agreed to parley.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 670a8d1d-8779-6eed-5f37-bbde38a125f5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h2cebdcaagdafcg4bb1g8613gdfa01df24714Text UUID: 1d7fb569-5e08-4361-8de9-cf975496ff4fTimeline Phase Index: 258Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 670a8d1d-8779-6eed-5f37-bbde38a125f5Timeline Phase Duration: 6.46sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                              • +
                                112.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It's fallen to me to secure an alliance.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 329d94d0-97c4-522a-9be3-fb8614f1894dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h1a525cdcg44b5g4960g8506g01ec1533b54fText UUID: 75b04243-56a8-4350-adbc-815bfd42cbe1Timeline Phase Index: 164Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 329d94d0-97c4-522a-9be3-fb8614f1894dTimeline Phase Duration: 4.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                • +

                                  • +
                                    358.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Heh. I was as surprised as anyone when Orpheus spoke the order, my love.!END_General_State_OrpheusIsMindFlayer!END_General_State_OrpheusPermaDefeatedORI_State_PartneredWithLaezel

                                    Flags and Tags

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9283de70-072c-1cb2-dc9c-ed5f6096f4aaSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h37f0d951g4199g4a90g9a87g7b19da259f75Text UUID: 712e9aac-f864-4d54-985e-cb14ac5a3637Timeline Phase Index: 45Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9283de70-072c-1cb2-dc9c-ed5f6096f4aaTimeline Phase Duration: 7sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                    • +
                                      216.No Speaker: Alias to Node 192
                                      • +
                                        192.Origin_Intro_Laezel: My blade is keen as ever. But it was you who showed me that a proper victory doesn't always require a razor-sharp edge.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 52a4af7e-ace7-289f-898a-6ed8c4a1fb21Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h375ceb63ge329g4ee4g92d4g33ae49eb17f5Text UUID: 4e4704b3-24e8-4f8d-8a90-f98569bf1812Timeline Phase Index: 265Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 52a4af7e-ace7-289f-898a-6ed8c4a1fb21Timeline Phase Duration: 10.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                        • +
                                          531.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Sometimes, a sincere plea is more persuasive than a dagger against the neck.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d3faf949-81ab-b486-4d22-de635adb7c2eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h69150a00gfcc7g4b4agbf64g42ff9b08543fText UUID: 8698b9e5-2fbc-41ac-ab2b-3d00fade48baTimeline Phase Index: 118Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d3faf949-81ab-b486-4d22-de635adb7c2eTimeline Phase Duration: 6.45sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                          • +
                                            347.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And sometimes, a bewitching smirk-and-quip gets the job done, Astarion-style.Astarion

                                            Flags and Tags

                                            checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                            • Astarion {23a46e79-e73c-4043-940f-cb0aace9ab2e} = True

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8c2eaddf-07a4-3aeb-ca53-9a2d5e23d3b1Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h6164be69ge95dg4df6g98eegd8b80143270eText UUID: 2957254e-c086-488a-80e7-b65f0de0b408Timeline Phase Index: 48Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8c2eaddf-07a4-3aeb-ca53-9a2d5e23d3b1Timeline Phase Duration: 8.89sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                                            • +
                                              68.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Menyar-Ag-Gith is an ascetic. He reached out in good faith. This is his way. It is in this spirit that I must meet him.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1f9f3cec-af6a-c4c4-04a9-3c35d437eb6fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hcf15ed38ge6ebg4942gbccbg05c875393ffdText UUID: af3f63e0-6bb4-4655-8c6b-09e22be9fa71Timeline Phase Index: 207Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1f9f3cec-af6a-c4c4-04a9-3c35d437eb6fTimeline Phase Duration: 10.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                              • +
                                                223.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And if he refuses, I carry on. Gravity pulls me in but one direction.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5d3b58b4-e663-2d2f-eebe-f4a7fa21f73dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h648546bdgf040g4f55g9428ge46008d462d3Text UUID: b091c461-1485-4fa2-9fc1-1a3d5a0c86c2Timeline Phase Index: 286Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5d3b58b4-e663-2d2f-eebe-f4a7fa21f73dTimeline Phase Duration: 8.41sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                • +
                                                  492.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I am the Comet. I will not rest until I burn Vlaakith's bones to ash and smash her phylactery to pieces.END_General_State_OrpheusPermaDefeated

                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                    • +
                                                      364.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Chk - but you've heard that refrain before. Zealous, bossy, insistent. All part and parcel of my undeniable charm.EPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Laezel

                                                          • +
                                                            489.Origin_Intro_Laezel: O! That I could touch you in flesh, run my hands across your skin.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c3d1bf53-4aa9-79b5-89db-c408bbd47b9aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8b98959fg0d60g4ec6gafbdg7a40aa959328Text UUID: 9b9c6f47-8325-4d9e-86e8-a69aeef02c0dTimeline Phase Index: 25Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c3d1bf53-4aa9-79b5-89db-c408bbd47b9aTimeline Phase Duration: 6.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                            • +
                                                              86.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I can feel you, even taste you in this form. But it is as if a thin layer of glass separates us. I can't quite have the whole of you.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 268ce369-74ff-360a-f6fd-183aa5de5deaSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hac328cd0gb03dg4f2bga018gf160ca8b83a7Text UUID: b7821f87-2f0d-42c6-ab2b-5361c8996abaTimeline Phase Index: 183Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 268ce369-74ff-360a-f6fd-183aa5de5deaTimeline Phase Duration: 15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                              • +

                                                                • +
                                                                  573.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Worth every one of those days and every drop of their sweat, I promise you.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e5e346a2-2423-7fe9-8e5e-1f3df117a12dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h7f3afef8ga468g4196g9572g9b25c49fd874Text UUID: 501351ef-a6b6-4ee2-86d7-df7ecf1c6f72Timeline Phase Index: 129Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e5e346a2-2423-7fe9-8e5e-1f3df117a12dTimeline Phase Duration: 6.26sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                                              • +
                                                                24.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It's taken a dozen gishes' talents, a few stolen psi crystals, and two tendays of effort to conjure my projection. 125178bd-12c9-7e29-9dee-318794c058cb_Projection

                                                        • +
                                                          136.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I know the feeling all too well.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3a1261d8-8c2c-d2e0-fbc9-3398b6531f7eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: he9f985a7gabf7g4027gb7a7g20bc7f07313bText UUID: 0fca38e2-1e1b-4e9b-9497-d0b41264a6dcTimeline Phase Index: 167Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3a1261d8-8c2c-d2e0-fbc9-3398b6531f7eTimeline Phase Duration: 3sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                          • +
                                                            29.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But that I can be in your presence at all is a wonder of its own.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0d88a8b2-5036-3144-c4ac-9eff2ee582bbSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h6ce6e73dgebb0g4b81g97e8gb6179adfe07fText UUID: aec6d3a2-2eec-4c32-af57-571fdb8bff11Timeline Phase Index: 187Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0d88a8b2-5036-3144-c4ac-9eff2ee582bbTimeline Phase Duration: 4.86sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                            • +
                                                              476.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It has taken all of Orpheus' efforts to conjure my projection - and all of mine to convince him to let me come.!END_General_State_OrpheusIsMindFlayer!END_General_State_OrpheusPermaDefeated125178bd-12c9-7e29-9dee-318794c058cb_Projection

                                                              • +
                                                                503.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Let's make the most of the moment, I say. May I kiss you?

                                                                • +

                                                                    • +
                                                                      144.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I can feel you, even taste you in this form. But it is as if a thin layer of glass separates us. I can't quite have the whole of you.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3d781a7c-f8c6-ccbb-da88-849fd6eb71aeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h77da4471g6a1bg4081ga37bgd7c04b36c8b2Text UUID: b5abad22-457e-4106-b128-3aec32a2ecd1Timeline Phase Index: 179Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3d781a7c-f8c6-ccbb-da88-849fd6eb71aeTimeline Phase Duration: 15sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                      • +
                                                                        533.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But soon - soon I'll find some way to see you in flesh. To touch you as you are meant to be touched.

                                                                        Metadata

                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d4314d90-0212-2ad8-e6fe-c189a386d122Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hc112d03fge874g4a09gb438g430ffdc2cefbText UUID: 1a19a9ee-8c29-42d4-88b8-8de8726dfbadTimeline Phase Index: 116Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d4314d90-0212-2ad8-e6fe-c189a386d122Timeline Phase Duration: 9.41sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                        • +
                                                                          446.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I need you.

                                                                          Metadata

                                                                          • +
                                                                            239.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And when the Comet has risen, we will be forever together, as surely as K'liir will forever circle the Sun.

                                                              381.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Worth it, I'd say. I missed this place. This - ahem - 'Fay-run'.note: With a big smile. A reference to her misponunciation earlier in the game.

                                                                495.Origin_Intro_Laezel: More to the point - I missed you.Approval_AtLeast_10_For_Sp2

                                                                Flags and Tags

                                                                checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Laezel
                                                                • Approval_AtLeast_10_For_Sp2 {fccac36f-92a5-ad84-9e45-fed71d386452} = True

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c714bc04-7d61-dab8-595d-f02316d0ab61Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8af3bb9egedb1g4573g95bfge9e5860d39c3Text UUID: e10a2a05-354e-4414-9abb-9b6792176385Timeline Phase Index: 222Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c714bc04-7d61-dab8-595d-f02316d0ab61Timeline Phase Duration: 12.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: c714bc04-7d61-dab8-595d-f02316d0ab61Group Index: 0
                                                                • +
                                                                  178.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But I'll be back to see you again when the Comet has risen, as surely as K'liir will forever circle the Sun.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4c897b7f-7e7c-051e-8167-8eed248faf78Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hd374848fg2a02g4311gb55cg588ca6aeaa86Text UUID: 0d7e5f0a-8ea0-4be8-8ce4-c6700cdea1a4Group ID: c714bc04-7d61-dab8-595d-f02316d0ab61Group Index: 1
                                                                  • See Node 294 Jump to Node 125
                                                              • +
                                                                356.Origin_Intro_Laezel: More to the point - I missed you. I wouldn't even deny it with Vlaakith's vorpal blade at my neck. Though I'd rather it not come to that.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 91305e48-3a5a-acfe-8129-4d7504611286Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h403a1228g88dfg4768gb6a3gde5d8936d224Text UUID: 57084fd2-04c3-49a6-b522-20dcb36cb43aTimeline Phase Index: 46Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 91305e48-3a5a-acfe-8129-4d7504611286Timeline Phase Duration: 12.61sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                • +
                                                                  12.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Now go, mingle a bit. That's the word, right? 'Mingle?'

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 04f0d684-a068-6ca9-eb60-2876aa8d37c0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h179c5346g9b72g48ebg9e89gdb75ef518c55Text UUID: a438c5d9-1e44-4029-bbcc-9de7a24dc531Timeline Phase Index: 194Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 04f0d684-a068-6ca9-eb60-2876aa8d37c0Timeline Phase Duration: 7.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                                  • +
                                                                    295.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But don't think you've seen the last of me. I'll be back, sure as the Comet will rise, sure as K'liir will forever circle the Sun.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 79925247-b203-d506-70fe-4788f3688140Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hdd973a7dgf446g4fddga705g6daef2799243Text UUID: 668f8720-7c4e-4359-889d-85a2d9203e35Timeline Phase Index: 244Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 79925247-b203-d506-70fe-4788f3688140Timeline Phase Duration: 12.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

                                                        • +
                                                          550.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I admit - I've longed for his guiding wisdom more than once. But I have not heard tell of him, nor has my mind felt his presence.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dcfdaec3-6012-4ada-d427-a217fdd3609cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hb34b144eg766fg4060g9cd4g2447859803baText UUID: 776243c8-57e2-49ed-b163-4c8882abaf78Timeline Phase Index: 115Timeline Dialog Node UUID: dcfdaec3-6012-4ada-d427-a217fdd3609cTimeline Phase Duration: 23.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: dcfdaec3-6012-4ada-d427-a217fdd3609cGroup Index: 0
                                                          • •
                                                            535.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Gith's son has been lost to the shadows. Perhaps one day, when the lich queen is dust, he will step into the light.

                                                                  • +
                                                                    274.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Xan is with the mages of Xamvadi'm. I'd trust his care to no one else.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6e95f71c-182a-3c4d-3ead-2b7290873726Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h63037c95g1d8dg43eag88efgd810c11c1f4aText UUID: 74495770-be8d-4277-8ba4-22ca5c58074fTimeline Phase Index: 247Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6e95f71c-182a-3c4d-3ead-2b7290873726Timeline Phase Duration: 6.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                    • +
                                                                      379.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Xan's destiny will be his own to follow. Warrior, poet, explorer, scholar. His way will be the way of the Comet:

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 98eea2bf-7f6c-9420-d369-cbb54e3b36d3Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha7dc9f39gc637g4bcfgb817g1de5bf7cadd1Text UUID: caa44fdf-1749-464b-8e86-fc7752fa03f9Timeline Phase Index: 58Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 98eea2bf-7f6c-9420-d369-cbb54e3b36d3Timeline Phase Duration: 20.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 98eea2bf-7f6c-9420-d369-cbb54e3b36d3Group Index: 0
                                                                      • •
                                                                        563.Origin_Intro_Laezel: No chains to bind us, no lies to bury us. Liberty will be the rallying cry that unites our empire.

                                                                        Metadata

                                                                    48.Origin_Intro_Laezel: So it has - and a fine man the hatchling will be. I call him Xan. 'Freedom'.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 17a55645-1f43-db03-609b-8bf1c006d3c4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8fd15607ga682g48c8ga4fagc99232753d74Text UUID: 6b933d1d-6427-418b-80f2-f518b6a2cf3fTimeline Phase Index: 215Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 17a55645-1f43-db03-609b-8bf1c006d3c4Timeline Phase Duration: 14.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 17a55645-1f43-db03-609b-8bf1c006d3c4Group Index: 0
                                                                    • +
                                                                      296.Origin_Intro_Laezel: He is with the mages of Xamvadi'm. I'd trust his care to no one else.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 799d9765-281a-fd1e-1aea-323ceb9fb8b0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h537fff9cg3b07g4e4bga529gfc00a98189c5Text UUID: 4cd0138c-1623-43ba-b0b8-5620319ce894Group ID: 17a55645-1f43-db03-609b-8bf1c006d3c4Group Index: 1
                                                                      • See Node 379 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) Xan's destiny will be his own to follow. Warrior, poet, explorer, scholar. His way will be the way of the Comet:
                                                                • +

                                                          • +
                                                            278.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I missed this place. More to the point, I missed you. I wouldn't even deny it with Vlaakith's vorpal blade at my neck. Though I'd rather it not come to that.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6ffea254-03e7-85b7-f896-b935cc070265Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha84b0c2eg3bbag4445g80feg830e32ce0e1cText UUID: 21395b00-027c-4412-8bb9-c8277744b2d2Timeline Phase Index: 253Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6ffea254-03e7-85b7-f896-b935cc070265Timeline Phase Duration: 15.37sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                            • +
                                                              484.No Speaker: Alias to Node 125
                                                              • See Node 125 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) I'll be back one day. The Overgod himself couldn't keep me away.

                                                  44.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I am a Warrior of the Comet. I will not rest until I burn Vlaakith's bones to ash and smash her phylactery to pieces.

                                      264.Narrator: *'Love'. The word hangs in the air for a moment before Lae'zel continues, unfazed.*

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6a79278f-3001-fba0-6d5c-db04c31f973cSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h30fb944egd8bag43bfga833g4b2e479eafcdText UUID: 5534b7eb-8ef8-487e-8ff0-f9d012586685Timeline Phase Index: 228Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6a79278f-3001-fba0-6d5c-db04c31f973cTimeline Phase Duration: 8.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                      • See Node 192 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) My blade is keen as ever. But it was you who showed me that a proper victory doesn't always require a razor-sharp edge.

                                    119.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You might as well ask if the stars will ever snuff out, or Avernus freeze over. A consideration for the far future.

                                          • +
                                            35.Origin_Intro_Laezel: He is also a near-deity. Should the githzerai join us, we could topple The City of Death in a red dragon's blink.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 124d0636-ee37-b1b6-2599-e0068287e9e5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h754d24ddg7a72g4a8dga34bg37fc3e425b3eText UUID: 502a6469-003d-4d1d-bda3-3bf96748dc18Timeline Phase Index: 201Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 124d0636-ee37-b1b6-2599-e0068287e9e5Timeline Phase Duration: 17.83sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 124d0636-ee37-b1b6-2599-e0068287e9e5Group Index: 0
                                            • +
                                              111.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Should they refuse, I carry on. Gravity pulls me in but one direction.

                          • +
                            58.Narrator: *Zaerith Menyar-Ag-Gith - you've heard the name. The immortal god-king of the githzerai, and ruler of their capital, Shra'kt'lor.*

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1b9ea745-4b55-d454-d6d7-e77a4616f491Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h25ef1ffcgd8eeg4a42gb530gb96d32070df7Text UUID: 79b18164-3fbf-49ae-8106-e6f26e8b03a9Timeline Phase Index: 211Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1b9ea745-4b55-d454-d6d7-e77a4616f491Timeline Phase Duration: 10.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                            • See Node 246 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) Our gish sent word of the rebellion to Menyar-Ag-Gith through the cosmos. He's agreed to parley.
                        • +
                          353.No Speaker: Alias to Node 443, Node 97
                          • +
                            443.Player: Zaerith Menyar-Ag-Gith? What is that?Full-Illithid

                            • +
                              173.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Not a what, but a who. The immortal god-king of the githzerai - an exiled people, once kin with mine until the madness of civil war ripped our one sky into two.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 49ed4d08-5b90-68d4-6122-0123d3e3f610Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hee474ab0g4943g4025g9130g7334fcc9fd66Text UUID: 796b9495-8736-4aa3-9316-cd2bf93cf886Timeline Phase Index: 238Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 49ed4d08-5b90-68d4-6122-0123d3e3f610Timeline Phase Duration: 15.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                              • See Node 246 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) Our gish sent word of the rebellion to Menyar-Ag-Gith through the cosmos. He's agreed to parley.
                          • +
                            97.Player: Nod your head as if the word means anything at all to you.Full-Illithid

                            Flags and Tags

                            ruletagtype rule

                            • +
                              366.Origin_Intro_Laezel: No need to pretend - I know the word means little to you.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 94963bb7-bcda-4934-54ac-df603a2af92fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hd49c08b4g6bbcg44e3gbce9g909b2091dbaaText UUID: 509cefed-7322-4d2d-821c-83fa74bfde80Timeline Phase Index: 41Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 94963bb7-bcda-4934-54ac-df603a2af92fTimeline Phase Duration: 4.83sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                              • +
                                325.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Shra'kt'lor is the capital of the githzerai - an exiled people, once kin with mine until the madness of civil war ripped our one sky into two.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 838c3a40-7bbc-08e2-f99a-9654a16055e5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8ecadb44g49a2g4f92gaf97g29081998401cText UUID: 62f9b196-703d-4bca-9434-f9ef0da54301Timeline Phase Index: 52Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 838c3a40-7bbc-08e2-f99a-9654a16055e5Timeline Phase Duration: 11.36sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                • +
                                  398.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Our gish sent word of the rebellion to their god-king Zaerith Menyar-Ag-Gith through the cosmos. He's agreed to parley.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a24e05f0-8123-5c67-2894-55d4e9758a42Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hc3c248deg4f01g4c43g92fegc9c45bf5d6cbText UUID: 3b8401a6-1ba1-4759-8668-5831c8dd9702Timeline Phase Index: 65Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a24e05f0-8123-5c67-2894-55d4e9758a42Timeline Phase Duration: 8.06sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                  • See Node 112 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) It's fallen to me to secure an alliance.
                    • +

                        399.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Not all of us can play the weave like a lyre, Gale. Orpheus may be Prince of the Comet, but he is not a god.!END_General_State_OrpheusIsMindFlayer!END_General_State_OrpheusPermaDefeatedORI_Gale_State_IsGodGale

          617.Origin_Intro_Laezel: For two months I trained the Knights of the Comet. For two more I skewered kith'raki bellies. And for two more yet I travelled through Limbo.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f8eac86f-fc55-4b4b-b397-a556c824a991Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h0680ba2cg1619g4f3dga07dg7d70e234dc9fText UUID: 32a68929-d958-4254-90f5-b21422fe7328Timeline Phase Index: 107Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f8eac86f-fc55-4b4b-b397-a556c824a991Timeline Phase Duration: 11.85sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • See Node 543 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) But nothing has made me quiver more than seeing your face here today, tentacles and all.
    • +

      429.Origin_Intro_Laezel: That's my strapping girl. Burning hot - but not too hot, praise Withers.note: Confident, but softer than ever. She has been in service to Orpheus' cause, but happy to be here.END_GameFinale_State_LaezelOrpheusPathApproval_AtLeast_10_For_Sp2Karlach

          432.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I never imagined we'd be standing toe to toe on this day, in this place.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ae09b118-1928-79c8-cdcb-e3c24cb24fb8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h852b1151g5f15g4cf3g8ce5g82e346f326adText UUID: 761784e7-da9a-46c5-bd50-2788908d422dTimeline Phase Index: 282Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ae09b118-1928-79c8-cdcb-e3c24cb24fb8Timeline Phase Duration: 18.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: ae09b118-1928-79c8-cdcb-e3c24cb24fb8Group Index: 0
          • +
            235.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Nothing but allies, I always told myself. A necessary partnership. But in spite of every strained word, every barbed glance -

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5ffc8006-bbc4-53a7-5046-1f6f5a97f016Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h57595cb5gb390g448ega41fgb34e5d545c75Text UUID: 7fe7a3a7-661f-4f20-a65f-132cf886e276Group ID: ae09b118-1928-79c8-cdcb-e3c24cb24fb8Group Index: 1
            • +
              629.Origin_Intro_Laezel: - seeing Grand Duke Wyll Ravengard brings me even more pleasure than taking a royal inquisitor's head.GLO_Wyll_State_GrandDukeWyll

      255.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Chk.note: Not sure she's happy to see you at first, but she comes around. But she starts with her old greeting.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 689b3977-29d2-6edf-e5d8-b214b10246bfSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h5b9d82f0g9fd1g41a1g9446gfc65201f54d7Text UUID: 17a3fdbb-3341-44a9-aa91-9993587c8f5eTimeline Phase Index: 233Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 689b3977-29d2-6edf-e5d8-b214b10246bfTimeline Phase Duration: 1.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
      • See Node 417 (No Speaker) Alias to Node 432
      • See Node 234 (No Speaker) Alias to Node 432
  • -
    104.Origin_Intro_Laezel: For two months we trained as Knights of the Comet. For two more we skewered kith'raki bellies. And for two more yet we travelled through Limbo.!END_General_State_OrpheusIsMindFlayer!END_General_State_OrpheusPermaDefeatedORI_Laezel_State_PlayerLaezelOrpheusEPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Laezel

    Flags and Tags

    settype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • EPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Laezel {6e30cdaf-463b-6013-42c4-ff58e242793a} = True

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 2e5e8631-ed91-9f3a-1007-e31042972c21Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h5127496fgaa49g4606gaf93g7292a869eabaText UUID: a47e3d15-ff1b-4e31-8fc4-38b6ac855e8aTimeline Phase Index: 3Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2e5e8631-ed91-9f3a-1007-e31042972c21Timeline Phase Duration: 28.79sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      133.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It has taken all of Orpheus' efforts to conjure our projections here - and all of mine to convince him to let us come.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 38f01abc-31d4-6f22-a950-ace5f2297e67Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h4e6144ebgca9fg47e0gb63cg008858341eb0Text UUID: 11fe0f80-5f90-42a5-91d0-682d6e0dc62aGroup ID: 2e5e8631-ed91-9f3a-1007-e31042972c21Group Index: 1
      • +
        291.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Worth it, I'd say. Right here, right now, there's no other place I'd sooner be.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 77eeddcb-f47d-af69-763d-ecd0f0daaf24Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: he4f651d4gdd89g4f61g9593g99b7d50470f3Text UUID: 36358d4c-b478-440c-bad9-1271c8fd2e47Group ID: 2e5e8631-ed91-9f3a-1007-e31042972c21Group Index: 2
        • +
          196.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Enjoy your night, chatter away. For tomorrow, we face Zaerith Menyar-Ag-Gith.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 54161fec-eaf2-cf18-603c-d4a408f87812Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h91737f08g92e8g4049gbde4g12b92a6e1037Text UUID: f0a15292-fef6-48d0-9c1e-e6a6a20b9aa4Timeline Phase Index: 268Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 54161fec-eaf2-cf18-603c-d4a408f87812Timeline Phase Duration: 19sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 54161fec-eaf2-cf18-603c-d4a408f87812Group Index: 0
          • +
            275.Narrator: *Zaerith Menyar-Ag-Gith. How well you know the name - the immortal god-king of the githzerai, and ruler of their capital, Shra'kt'lor.*

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6ea671c9-10d4-89c8-50ec-099c565cd00aSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h2c181a71g1fcag4486ga20agf3830cb2f9c3Text UUID: 5b5e8004-ace6-4cfa-ad73-d7e349a66440Group ID: 54161fec-eaf2-cf18-603c-d4a408f87812Group Index: 1
            • +
              262.Narrator: *And how glad you are that the plane of Limbo remains untouched by the sun.*!ORI_Astarion_State_BecameVampireLordAstarion

                  528.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I do. Menyar-Ag-Gith is an ascetic. He reached out in good faith. He will aid us if we meet him in the same spirit, my love.ORI_State_PartneredWithLaezel

                  Flags and Tags

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bc015aa1-8fe9-c5bb-1c2c-9045fd450baeSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hcadca138g829dg4378ga921g952550c2bb83Text 1 UUID: 755e33f0-d8c3-4a67-8179-c439cb4fde28Text 2 Handle: h3cd77a9bg7b3ag4b1dgaffdg95186b4af621Text 2 UUID: 74829c10-704c-4964-8a19-651aae761703Show Once: True
                • +
                  151.Origin_Intro_Laezel: We've spilled blood, gained a foothold in the Astral. But still, we need allies. And one beyond reckoning has made himself known.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 404f35ad-545b-c028-dfba-a30b5530862cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h72c7feb4g59e7g41efga0d9gd0cb9f57a6cfText UUID: 481672cf-87bd-4544-a5e9-1154be9186ccTimeline Phase Index: 173Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 404f35ad-545b-c028-dfba-a30b5530862cTimeline Phase Duration: 10.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                  • +
                    523.No Speaker: Alias to Node 568
                    • +
                      568.Origin_Intro_Laezel: He is also a near-deity. Should the githzerai join us, we could topple The City of Death in a red dragon's blink.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e484ed3e-75d6-6764-cccf-d5ce4463579dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h7d210b24g5fbeg414dgb2f4g20ba85eb3bcdText UUID: 0c1a9240-abe2-4f60-8a2a-25512e41918aTimeline Phase Index: 135Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e484ed3e-75d6-6764-cccf-d5ce4463579dTimeline Phase Duration: 9.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                      • +
                        540.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Trust me - my blade is keen as ever. But it was here, in Faerûn, where I learned a proper victory doesn't always require a razor-sharp edge.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d7398503-0ca6-5493-a761-e99852c85c1bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h10ba2166g9adeg4514gb99egbb64f494bed8Text UUID: 347dacbe-8f2d-456c-9f67-f846b09bea44Timeline Phase Index: 138Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d7398503-0ca6-5493-a761-e99852c85c1bTimeline Phase Duration: 13.91sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                        • +
                          380.No Speaker: Alias to Node 305
                          • +
                            305.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And if Menyar-Ag-Gith refuses, we carry on. Gravity pulls us in but one direction.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7d4d96ad-f4bb-e68b-2461-3bfe1c5e6120Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha3bf9218g33ebg4dd5gb509gd471628aed3cText UUID: a99a2844-e1fd-44f5-a1c9-3a7bf8be68c6Timeline Phase Index: 127Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7d4d96ad-f4bb-e68b-2461-3bfe1c5e6120Timeline Phase Duration: 7.18sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                            • +
                              376.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I am the Comet. We will blaze forth until we burn Vlaakith's bones to ash and smash her phylactery to pieces.END_General_State_OrpheusPermaDefeated

                              Flags and Tags

                              checktype Global
                              • END_General_State_OrpheusPermaDefeated {9255d9c6-39b2-4436-bd03-c08d99526257} = True

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 986bfc25-2e17-d540-3d2b-8a51d66d015cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h17e52674gb08fg4914gbd53g7e415a09e22fText UUID: b4a19683-8605-4e63-aa64-d7cd5beade81Timeline Phase Index: 57Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 986bfc25-2e17-d540-3d2b-8a51d66d015cTimeline Phase Duration: 9.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                              • +
                                6.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And when the Comet has risen, we will be forever together, as surely as K'liir will forever circle the Sun.ORI_State_PartneredWithLaezelEPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Laezel

                                • +

                                  • +
                                    293.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Love. Until I knew you, I thought the mere idea a joke. A weakness indulged only by lesser species.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 78cb298c-3b6c-92b9-ccc1-318c50c53129Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h3c525c43gd08dg4a7cgbe42g7de1d1719c25Text UUID: d95d3f86-1bf9-44b8-9566-8330b9a7ec19Timeline Phase Index: 198Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 78cb298c-3b6c-92b9-ccc1-318c50c53129Timeline Phase Duration: 16.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 78cb298c-3b6c-92b9-ccc1-318c50c53129Group Index: 0
                                    • +
                                      4.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You proved me a fool. I am forever grateful.

                                      Metadata

                                  • +
                                    442.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I admit - I've longed for his guiding wisdom more than once. But I have not heard tell of him, nor has my mind felt his presence.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b21cdce1-43da-8581-aa07-34d6aedf3f96Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hc52a3357g67e7g4b0dgb605g3ab7f0bdbf6bText UUID: 80e02724-ba07-412b-b1b8-fcbbd972fba4Timeline Phase Index: 12Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b21cdce1-43da-8581-aa07-34d6aedf3f96Timeline Phase Duration: 22.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: b21cdce1-43da-8581-aa07-34d6aedf3f96Group Index: 0
                                    • •
                                      630.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Gith's son has been lost to the shadows. Perhaps one day, when the lich queen is dust, he will step into the light.

                                      Metadata

                                611.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And when the Comet has risen, the githyanki will be free. Free to act, free to speak. Through us, they will feel the embrace of Mother Gith.EPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Laezel

                Variant 2

                A githzerai alliance - incredible. Could the gith unite under one sky once again?
                h74a6c7f6g25adg4ee9gbba2g76d152be1260 | 626d1a19-5433-4ab6-a89a-1bda800b4bf9 | stub

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0b7e7da5-2623-2e3b-6131-19f963f7982dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: hefde110fg1fa9g402dg85c8g75d00f2ecccfText 1 UUID: 7fe573f1-20ca-48b2-997a-b5c75f67a65cText 2 Handle: h74a6c7f6g25adg4ee9gbba2g76d152be1260Text 2 UUID: 626d1a19-5433-4ab6-a89a-1bda800b4bf9Show Once: True
                • +
                  77.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You might as well ask if the stars will ever snuff out, or Avernus freeze over. A consideration for the far future.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2362512d-72e4-09b6-cb51-ed87d2c3072cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8a23197ega66dg4eebg9e7bg7b870e5006bdText UUID: b1fba280-d76c-490b-93dc-741c5905579dTimeline Phase Index: 204Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2362512d-72e4-09b6-cb51-ed87d2c3072cTimeline Phase Duration: 9.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • +
                    201.Origin_Intro_Laezel: For now, I don't want the githzerai to fight for us - just with us, my love.ORI_State_PartneredWithLaezel

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player

                        95.No Speaker: Alias to Node 568
                        • See Node 568 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) He is also a near-deity. Should the githzerai join us, we could topple The City of Death in a red dragon's blink.

  • -
    597.Origin_Intro_Laezel: For two months we trained the Knights of the Comet. For two more we skewered kith'raki bellies. And for two more yet we travelled through Limbo.ORI_Laezel_State_PlayerLaezelOrpheusEPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Laezel

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • ORI_Laezel_State_PlayerLaezelOrpheus {9bbf4067-fcb1-0c74-088d-ff887ca2abe5} = True
    settype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • EPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Laezel {6e30cdaf-463b-6013-42c4-ff58e242793a} = True

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: efedc0c3-d8e6-6437-61f5-fcfcfdfac13dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h29916dfbg98ccg4cfcgb04dg544368e4639dText UUID: cb6a3509-bea3-4851-90a8-7a4c0538ce18Timeline Phase Index: 4Timeline Dialog Node UUID: efedc0c3-d8e6-6437-61f5-fcfcfdfac13dTimeline Phase Duration: 29.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      501.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It's taken a dozen gishes' talents and a few stolen psi crystals, and two tendays of effort to conjure our projections here.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: caa21bfa-1a6a-7bca-949c-c448ad51b811Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h143beb75gfe62g45ebgb657gc0963d55165aText UUID: 03e1a855-4e72-4d7d-8761-be6dfab042fbGroup ID: efedc0c3-d8e6-6437-61f5-fcfcfdfac13dGroup Index: 1
      • +
        254.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Worth every one of those days and every drop of their sweat. Right here, right now, there's no other place I'd sooner be.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 685ae7f7-19c1-5b15-e560-c80e691775faSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hdd2c95adg065ag46fag95e6g83f8f6f72e6fText UUID: 3b9dec4c-16eb-462e-9a4b-6b8f01e3b91cGroup ID: efedc0c3-d8e6-6437-61f5-fcfcfdfac13dGroup Index: 2
        • See Node 196 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) Enjoy your night, chatter away. For tomorrow, we face Zaerith Menyar-Ag-Gith.
  • -

          370.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But I was wrong. Being right here, with you, is an infinitely greater pleasure.

                      • +
                        298.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Of course. Mortals are meant to worship and obey. What other role might they possibly play in the life of a god?

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 79f1d517-e71f-6ea7-d692-e6038fd5855aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h572a3cdagabd9g40b9g85fag56768ab1bdbeText UUID: 09ae9ae7-8d13-4e60-956e-cbcb8a96a9c2Timeline Phase Index: 242Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 79f1d517-e71f-6ea7-d692-e6038fd5855aTimeline Phase Duration: 9.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                        • +
                          383.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Well. Why don't you go and mingle? That's the word, right? 'Mingle?'

                          Metadata

                                565.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Love. Until I knew you, I thought the mere idea a joke. A weakness indulged only by lesser species.

                                Metadata

                                • +

                                128.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Of course. I have complete trust in our newest allies. Xan is in fine hands tonight.

                                • +

                                183.Origin_Intro_Laezel: So it has. I call him Xan. 'Freedom'.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4f5561d4-02c6-60bd-103f-0f632bff63b7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha6141e5cg65b3g43cbg8257ge09cc5414217Text UUID: 100a9028-1be9-4d47-b4e9-334763d283c9Timeline Phase Index: 262Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4f5561d4-02c6-60bd-103f-0f632bff63b7Timeline Phase Duration: 11.32sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 4f5561d4-02c6-60bd-103f-0f632bff63b7Group Index: 0
                                • +
                                  450.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Tonight, he is safe among people I proudly call friends.

                                  • See Node 448 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) What a wonder he is. He will be a fine warrior, if he chooses. Or a poet, or an explorer, or a scholar.
                            • +

                        • +
                          622.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I suppose to you, mortals are meant only to worship and obey. What other role might they possibly play in the life of a god?

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fb547f70-d610-c142-85f3-35dfaa9a200dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha0be83cdg25b6g408ega5f1g44462cf2dcccText UUID: 0d9a9c2b-dd9e-434c-817b-f233b19257c0Timeline Phase Index: 105Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fb547f70-d610-c142-85f3-35dfaa9a200dTimeline Phase Duration: 10.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                          • See Node 383 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) Well. Why don't you go and mingle? That's the word, right? 'Mingle?'

                        453.Origin_Intro_Laezel: *Sigh* I suppose you are right. We have seen too much black and red these last months.

                        Metadata

                        • +
                          614.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Waukeentide is to start soon in Waterdeep, as I understand it. You are due a hometown celebration - a gust of bright colours among familiar streets.Gale

                      633.Player: I wouldn't say no to a big feeding. I'd hate for all those memories to go to waste.Full-IllithidEPI_Epilogue_Event_BattleWithLaezel

                      • +
                        487.Origin_Intro_Laezel: A githyanki leading a ghaik to feed on her own people. Not even the greatest senja'si could have conjured such a vision.

                        Metadata

                        268.Origin_Intro_Laezel: My love, my Shadowheart. To think there was a time when we were at each others' throats.ORI_State_PartneredWithLaezel

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                        • ORI_State_PartneredWithLaezel {d169a786-6e56-4f0d-a2eb-33c48d8d1160} = True

                        • +
                          164.Narrator: *'Love'. The word hangs in the air for a moment before Lae'zel continues, unfazed.*

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4518326d-70be-4b2e-e2f3-6f365cd5d66eSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h0d678acfg03ffg4669g9321g202d6c14579dText UUID: c8e48470-362d-49f4-a1c1-9a6c9dde2292Timeline Phase Index: 170Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4518326d-70be-4b2e-e2f3-6f365cd5d66eTimeline Phase Duration: 8.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • +
                            393.Origin_Intro_Laezel: We'll devise a plan of attack soon enough. For now, why don't you go and mingle? That's the word, right? 'Mingle?'

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9e21e2db-2f38-adfa-96cd-33cb6c8b5915Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: haca96e17gdd1ag471bga178g55a9f4994605Text UUID: 6a6ffe70-7771-4142-9830-238bd00c02e1Timeline Phase Index: 67Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9e21e2db-2f38-adfa-96cd-33cb6c8b5915Timeline Phase Duration: 10.13sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                            • +

                        544.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I understand. I need you, love - but they need you even more.

                        Metadata

                      • See Node 544 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) I understand. I need you, love - but they need you even more.
              • +

          555.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I thought watching you slay Vlaakith's hunters in the cliffs of Sword's Teeth might be the month's pinnacle.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: de31bc6b-f5f5-cc6f-b807-7d03ece62f46Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h576eacbdg7fe3g4849g96a6g96a02b929648Text UUID: 82448e0c-a28a-4d1a-9a4d-5c90cdd34da4Timeline Phase Index: 140Timeline Dialog Node UUID: de31bc6b-f5f5-cc6f-b807-7d03ece62f46Timeline Phase Duration: 8.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
          • See Node 370 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) But I was wrong. Being right here, with you, is an infinitely greater pleasure.
      • •

        391.Origin_Intro_Laezel: When you bid me to stay in Faerûn, to vanquish Vlaakith assassins, I was hoping I might do so at your side.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9de7fa27-a6bb-e160-d806-e9a75dfc92afSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h9741dfb5g014dg4cf1g99ceg16ba6edccb82Text UUID: 82a4c1da-30a8-4bd8-9130-b7885a31da15Group ID: 55fada2b-b7b9-6ab2-7d72-f84e8ac7d0a1Group Index: 1
        • +
          10.Origin_Intro_Laezel: But I respect that you chose as you did. Tell me you've kept count of your kills, at very least.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 03d6ba2b-3a7f-db7c-4ea2-11caec31240dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h4bd011afg079dg491bgb30bg92e600aa53dbText UUID: 6269b94a-056d-471b-8219-dc50c985691eGroup ID: 55fada2b-b7b9-6ab2-7d72-f84e8ac7d0a1Group Index: 2
          • +
