              266.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Feisty indeed, if it troubled a warrior as seasoned as you - and as exquisite.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6ac81f59-f25b-5737-2282-056ef66cebcbSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h376ea76fg6acbg4336gb422g8c2a0a47ec9aText UUID: 5e09933a-f573-46a2-bbcf-c20b2570e284Timeline Phase Index: 226Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6ac81f59-f25b-5737-2282-056ef66cebcbTimeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • +
                259.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Nngh. The thought of you sweaty from battle - It is all I can do not to ravish you, here and now. Perhaps we might find time later for a bit of... indulgence.note: Lae'zel looks you over, then breathes deep.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 68e3bc4e-6110-e0b8-5b16-724256eace88Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hd30d6f0fgc0ceg49a5gbf38g851beca4a6aeText UUID: 1ac4c3bf-af02-42b9-93e2-29856b89615aTimeline Phase Index: 231Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 68e3bc4e-6110-e0b8-5b16-724256eace88Timeline Phase Duration: 16.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                • +
                  168.Player: Yes. Hells, how I've missed your body.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 469e23e6-374b-bbf6-f904-cdf3252ab559Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h67b0c952g7d08g472cga385gcde4cf190c7eText UUID: 650dda00-0396-467a-86ba-bff045554273Show Once: True
                  • +
                    16.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Later, then. When the music has died down and our friends' eyes have gone half-lidded.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 076878da-d49d-56b2-d5ec-58db4c190ff9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hc58972b7ge033g4179ga484gee1636612cc7Text UUID: affa170f-5e3c-4f20-8760-d56ec97c2b32Timeline Phase Index: 200Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 076878da-d49d-56b2-d5ec-58db4c190ff9Timeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • +

                • +
                  344.Player: Let's see where the night takes us.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8aa15034-0f9a-adf8-0e82-e7e0d6699d96Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he15e9bdfgb48cg4942g9b77g6fa22bbc7aedText UUID: 50c935d8-d944-4097-a686-785683058878Show Once: True
                  • +
                    154.Origin_Intro_Laezel: As you wish. I do hope it leads to surprises. Pleasant, steamy surprises.

                    Metadata

              350.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Ha! Worried yours can't compare? Very well.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8e3742d7-0b8a-36c1-d492-de4ad40e3c13Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hbda7ce39g9022g42degbcbbg423a7353f2f7Text UUID: af4b76cc-6abf-4630-a1a3-db47e8ad688eTimeline Phase Index: 153Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8e3742d7-0b8a-36c1-d492-de4ad40e3c13Timeline Phase Duration: 22.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 8e3742d7-0b8a-36c1-d492-de4ad40e3c13Group Index: 0
              • +
                117.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Two Sword Coast strongholds of sixty of the queen's loyalists each, a raiding camp of twenty, and eight minor scouting parties. In all, twelve sarth and two kith'raki have fallen to my blade.

                Text

                Two Sword Coast strongholds of sixty of the queen's loyalists each, a raiding camp of twenty, and eight minor scouting parties. In all, twelve sarth and two kith'raki have fallen to my blade.
                h1963667egf1feg4068ga2f6g101410776afd | 7bc9d8b3-4d7c-4aee-a6d6-3f7f66239ba1 | stub

                • See Node 259 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) Nngh. The thought of you sweaty from battle - It is all I can do not to ravish you, here and now. Perhaps we might find time later for a bit of... indulgence.

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 823e9be9-3bd3-a0e7-4040-36abbd437bf7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hf4185d67g17acg4c22g96e0g566e5b382a94Text UUID: a1a58a8c-31c6-4376-8bc2-271778227c1aTimeline Phase Index: 223Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 823e9be9-3bd3-a0e7-4040-36abbd437bf7Timeline Phase Duration: 35.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 823e9be9-3bd3-a0e7-4040-36abbd437bf7Group Index: 0
      • +
        302.Origin_Intro_Laezel: The one who took Orpheus from me. The one who condemned the githyanki people to slavery.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7ab54700-7899-85bc-b36c-5bfe67462354Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h34b3d25ag9791g471bgad31g7e049724ad2dText UUID: 1a727100-322d-477a-b352-234c4bdcce30Group ID: 823e9be9-3bd3-a0e7-4040-36abbd437bf7Group Index: 1
        • +
          462.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I slayed Vlaakith's hunters in the cliffs of Sword's Teeth and the wetlands of Lizard Marsh.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b7ee8f91-505f-71ea-a074-0dacbe2daf5aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hc15cecc8g7b86g4d03g926dgf4d7bc4f1419Text UUID: 875903f8-aa3e-40de-94c7-065232b60ce2Group ID: 823e9be9-3bd3-a0e7-4040-36abbd437bf7Group Index: 2
          • +
            271.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Part of me believes the ghaik before me should meet the same fate -

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6e1a3c6e-4d62-c82d-3650-fdab06e807beSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h413ec5e8g1414g4433g89f6g60f7bb2da7d6Text UUID: fb2f301f-2618-47b1-8404-9862eeee3edeGroup ID: 823e9be9-3bd3-a0e7-4040-36abbd437bf7Group Index: 3
            • +
              281.Origin_Intro_Laezel: - but truth is, I'm glad to see you. I wouldn't even deny it with Vlaakith's vorpal blade at my neck. Though I'd rather it not come to that.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 731db542-ed08-dd12-d502-090634e80fddSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h33fd4d9egcd94g4c3eg973dgd40b31f51694Text UUID: 2076eb7e-8f89-447d-88c8-34040d0970a3Group ID: 823e9be9-3bd3-a0e7-4040-36abbd437bf7Group Index: 4
              • +

                Metadata

                Node Type: AliasUUID: aa99ee62-1a31-68a1-6928-5f00ef8b8b22Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)Show Once: True
                • +
                  279.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Of course, there are ways you might make amends.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 70d315ae-a4a5-4b7b-3b7d-0f4293a78d07Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h398b8906gf158g4694ga329g897634c5a79bText UUID: 8cb9363d-c34a-41ec-a77f-628518234147Timeline Phase Index: 252Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 70d315ae-a4a5-4b7b-3b7d-0f4293a78d07Timeline Phase Duration: 13.04sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 70d315ae-a4a5-4b7b-3b7d-0f4293a78d07Group Index: 0
                  • +
                    580.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I've got wind of a githyanki outpost hidden deep in Chult. The last of Vlaakith's Sword Coast strongholds.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e92a2070-4a62-2eeb-58fb-a6e20956e246Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h35ffcd0eg5749g4af9ga45ageed3daef4840Text UUID: 5a59ddc6-a5bc-4445-a516-16cab72ccfc7Group ID: 70d315ae-a4a5-4b7b-3b7d-0f4293a78d07Group Index: 1
                    • +
                      469.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I don't suppose you'd consider fleeing the Hells and joining me there to slay every last sarth and kith'rak.END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                      • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = True

                    • +
                      50.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I say we sneak in under cover of night. We slit every last throat and you feed until your belly's full.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 187caba7-a985-681b-a9f2-5a40a71baeabSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hf6780a8ag4d3cg4043g89eeg886f9a17884cText UUID: 66b5a7c9-6041-4c08-8298-0103af6186c1Timeline Phase Index: 214Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 187caba7-a985-681b-a9f2-5a40a71baeabTimeline Phase Duration: 10.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                      • +
                        74.Player: I wouldn't say no to a big feeding. I'd hate for all those memories to go to waste.EPI_Epilogue_Event_BattleWithLaezel

                        Flags and Tags

                        settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                        • EPI_Epilogue_Event_BattleWithLaezel {29245b6c-ea66-c3b7-cd81-d7965dda7bd7} = True

                              405.Origin_Intro_Laezel: There is plenty of time yet for slicing scalps and tasting blood. [End]

                              Metadata

                      • +
                        332.Player: I'm going to enjoy tonight's respite while we can. We'll talk about this later.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 84db326b-2a1f-ef2e-7f71-0201e1e0df0bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf1823b1fg4080g4a8egaff0gc81077a8fb9eText UUID: 3598e3d3-a499-4416-8ea3-abcfeaa7239aShow Once: True

                      • +
                        28.Player: I owe no amends. You're on your own.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0be078e8-9582-ffea-906e-1c0c04fe638cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd104c5d1g557bg4cfbgbe53g0bc12c7d79f6Text UUID: d2601a47-641c-44e0-83bf-980e8335e78dShow Once: True
                        • +
                          286.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Disappointing. But I won't argue - my heart has no room for new grudges.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 755e4fd5-4d3e-f74c-a51c-79aaf9fce664Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h8503d2d8g43c8g4ae2ga67bg3f9d7329996cText UUID: 49b9ee71-6e50-47d3-ac64-cda74691d455Timeline Phase Index: 249Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 755e4fd5-4d3e-f74c-a51c-79aaf9fce664Timeline Phase Duration: 7.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • +
                            288.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Go, mingle while you can. That's the word, right? 'Mingle?'

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 767f8eab-87a2-8205-5c9f-1cc01c1fc6e3Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h124c3a02gcb42g4779g9d8eg3611834cc6dcText UUID: 83dc6a4f-8d23-484d-8b07-40e1f6852bfeTimeline Phase Index: 248Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 767f8eab-87a2-8205-5c9f-1cc01c1fc6e3Timeline Phase Duration: 6.74sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

      249.Origin_Intro_Laezel: That's my strapping girl. Burning hot - but not too hot, praise Withers.note: Confident, but softer than ever. Happy to be here, to have a break from killing Vlaakith's agents.!END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellApproval_AtLeast_10_For_Sp2Karlach

      • +
        538.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I never imagined we'd be standing toe to toe on this day, in this place.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d5a937b8-046a-9b89-199e-3291452abb3cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h17c93a26g15f4g4c10g99e8gd4133dffecb8Text UUID: a46dfb1a-dafb-4f9f-88d4-001f5b110648Timeline Phase Index: 216Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d5a937b8-046a-9b89-199e-3291452abb3cTimeline Phase Duration: 19.07sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: d5a937b8-046a-9b89-199e-3291452abb3cGroup Index: 0
        • +
          45.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Nothing but allies, I always told myself. A necessary partnership. But in spite of every strained word, every barbed glance -

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 165e53b2-499f-37d1-d60a-682a616fd619Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h2c1e3205g6abag46b7gb8d6g64ee9427e319Text UUID: 5ecdd2d6-be8d-4e47-9292-d3b2f4296461Group ID: d5a937b8-046a-9b89-199e-3291452abb3cGroup Index: 1
          • +
            145.Origin_Intro_Laezel: - seeing your wonderful, hideous face brings me more pleasure than taking a royal inquisitor's head.Full-Illithid

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
            • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = True

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3dc8e7fc-f179-21ff-4755-0cf4e386b590Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hb27cc2begaf3fg4d46g9f2bg60944813c4c8Text UUID: 4b9d3659-c0b2-42e8-b596-8e210e5678f7Timeline Phase Index: 178Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3dc8e7fc-f179-21ff-4755-0cf4e386b590Timeline Phase Duration: 9.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • +

              Metadata

              Node Type: AliasUUID: 39f1858a-b5ff-1ea3-ead9-dad20e2a2052Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)Show Once: True
              • +
                36.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Were it not for you, I might not have known the value of partnership. Connection.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 12864b20-b311-bb8d-1294-bd7dcc125f2aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h678e8574gfcedg4e76g8c9age6e0465949d7Text UUID: a6130d0a-f9a0-45ef-8c1d-489753b89ca5Timeline Phase Index: 202Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 12864b20-b311-bb8d-1294-bd7dcc125f2aTimeline Phase Duration: 6sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                • +
                  625.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Sacrifice.Full-Illithid

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                  • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fbf17217-fed9-2bfc-54c9-57c3f30ebf74Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hffd66fc9gf6f7g45f2ga060gf7628abcdcccText UUID: e8c4a1fe-8c2d-4ba1-857c-5417d61f1cfaTimeline Phase Index: 110Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fbf17217-fed9-2bfc-54c9-57c3f30ebf74Timeline Phase Duration: 2.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                  • +
                    277.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I've found new allies, now. New... friends. People I trust, and who trust me in return.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6fb2b9fd-a55e-a7d0-9a09-fde2ab6f89a0Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: ha9cf1687gcab7g4ba8g958cg24cd0d207052Text UUID: f2be5572-c64d-4abc-bc8b-4acf6bbcb007Timeline Phase Index: 254Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6fb2b9fd-a55e-a7d0-9a09-fde2ab6f89a0Timeline Phase Duration: 19.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 6fb2b9fd-a55e-a7d0-9a09-fde2ab6f89a0Group Index: 0
                    • +
                      546.Origin_Intro_Laezel: We've heard word of a githyanki outpost hidden deep in Chult. The last of Vlaakith's Sword Coast strongholds.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: da23292e-f682-bcc9-00e6-d2e87b07e5dcSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hd75984a3g14e2g4d2eg98fag2f82dfcea901Text UUID: 99548ca6-4367-45ec-ba94-cd4462db57d8Group ID: 6fb2b9fd-a55e-a7d0-9a09-fde2ab6f89a0Group Index: 1
                      • +
                        70.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I don't suppose you'd consider fleeing the Hells and joining us there to slay every last sarth and kith'rak.END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                        • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = True

                        • +
                          98.Player: I'm sorry, Lae'zel. I belong at Karlach's side.Full-Illithid

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2c3b298d-8c84-8e6e-8a91-8d7e41b5d608Speaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h1629eeaagbf4fg4d0ag85fag3d6612dc3937Text 1 UUID: 4986ae26-9bbe-46e1-b848-87268aaf2d0aText 2 Handle: h096422b3g517fg4b8agbf3dg42f707f13396Text 2 UUID: eb0ca109-086b-487d-88c2-52c620801c60Show Once: True
                          • +
                            418.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Your loyalty to her knows no bounds. Nor, it seems, does your fortitude.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a98fdc90-2c76-9d34-21e0-0f64d6107d35Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: haa571295gbbbeg4f50g987fg04112285a14fText UUID: 960afe1f-40d7-4bb6-bfe7-3682b92023b0Timeline Phase Index: 39Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a98fdc90-2c76-9d34-21e0-0f64d6107d35Timeline Phase Duration: 7.39sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                            • +
                              107.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You impressed me from the beginning, you know. It was my own foolish pride that ever kept me from admitting it - to you, or myself.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2f35aa60-51d0-fb06-31ce-d131cfddfbb7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h37269892g7051g4f76gb889g1520ca89ce08Text UUID: 0469949c-523b-4975-b582-aeb5af1b039eTimeline Phase Index: 212Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2f35aa60-51d0-fb06-31ce-d131cfddfbb7Timeline Phase Duration: 17.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 2f35aa60-51d0-fb06-31ce-d131cfddfbb7Group Index: 0
                              • +
                                56.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I - I just wanted you to know that.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1a70e307-92b6-4a15-9fd9-aa9de738dab5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h32fd1a1ege412g46a9g94d4g5cd81b3e54e2Text UUID: 0459e4a6-bfc6-4344-bb73-f2e55ee89e54Group ID: 2f35aa60-51d0-fb06-31ce-d131cfddfbb7Group Index: 1
                                • +
                                  232.No Speaker: Alias to Node 554
                                  • +
                                    554.Origin_Intro_Laezel: We'll meet again. The Hells are too small to contain a soul as tremendous as yours.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: de07d78b-76d6-91bb-7d26-fc0dfbb14198Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hb6874363g1d42g4351ga8e1g85c628cf2e80Text UUID: 3cdfa278-3042-48bd-8136-27754ba1c0c2Timeline Phase Index: 141Timeline Dialog Node UUID: de07d78b-76d6-91bb-7d26-fc0dfbb14198Timeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                    • +

                                      • +
                                        118.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I have not heard tell of him, nor has my mind felt his presence.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 34beadb3-694c-69aa-5816-ba1a8275f9c4Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h4d747a4eg6b62g4f41g9facg7c7e065a25e6Text UUID: 2da92a81-effe-4315-89ea-e07e2bd36defTimeline Phase Index: 190Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 34beadb3-694c-69aa-5816-ba1a8275f9c4Timeline Phase Duration: 15.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 34beadb3-694c-69aa-5816-ba1a8275f9c4Group Index: 0
                                        • •
                                          22.Origin_Intro_Laezel: It seems Gith's son has been lost to the shadows. Perhaps one day, he will step into the light.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0a350300-0479-7a62-e6f0-b52eb24406a9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hfd65f8cfg4687g4dafgb9b9g4640af35c8a4Text UUID: 26da5966-1d7f-4a8e-9635-56fde6949e35Group ID: 34beadb3-694c-69aa-5816-ba1a8275f9c4Group Index: 1
                                    • +
                                      23.Player: What about the egg you took with you? Has it hatched?Full-IllithidEPI_Epilogue_State_EndedGameWithGithEgg

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      ruletagtype rule
                                      • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}
                                      checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Laezel

                                      Text

                                      Variant 1

                                      combine=0
                                      • Full-Illithid
                                      What about the egg you took with you? Has it hatched?
                                      h0bbe8235g0dbcg4469g866age8cd584f19ea | 2c6fc3da-f034-42f0-a4c8-5565b8135e67 | stub

                                      Variant 2

                                      What about the egg you took with you? Has it hatched?
                                      h71dd15ebgeacag47bag87c8gbe679643a225 | 496d6dbb-b2f8-4444-9ce1-3ff23dc457a6 | stub

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0a37bfcc-c3c4-48b5-a697-9c89ef0f6cccSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text 1 Handle: h0bbe8235g0dbcg4469g866age8cd584f19eaText 1 UUID: 2c6fc3da-f034-42f0-a4c8-5565b8135e67Text 2 Handle: h71dd15ebgeacag47bag87c8gbe679643a225Text 2 UUID: 496d6dbb-b2f8-4444-9ce1-3ff23dc457a6Show Once: True
                                      • +
                                        126.Origin_Intro_Laezel: So it has - and a fine man the hatchling will be. I call him Xan. 'Freedom'.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3717f7fa-3758-2174-99a9-8b824262dc82Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h7bd591feg5201g4bc4ga3c0g4a5b21b11a68Text UUID: e272b47d-def9-473f-b83e-a0e2cd391a66Timeline Phase Index: 150Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3717f7fa-3758-2174-99a9-8b824262dc82Timeline Phase Duration: 22.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 3717f7fa-3758-2174-99a9-8b824262dc82Group Index: 0
                                        • +
                                          318.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Before you ask: yes, he is safe - in the care of people I trust.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 820c56cc-ab0a-493f-2b2a-b2ec0778c5d5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h42f527b0g1222g467cga4abg0565455b76f1Text UUID: fd400d2b-aaf6-4312-bc99-4b8f4ba4f444Group ID: 3717f7fa-3758-2174-99a9-8b824262dc82Group Index: 1
                                          • +
                                            152.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Xan will be a fine warrior, if he chooses. Or a poet, or an explorer, or a scholar.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 40e7b289-13bf-5dbb-61b0-9c853ddbf6eeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hfe98e813gcc4ag42b7g994fg113a79d23bf7Text UUID: b30517b8-9e7d-4c62-9ed1-f01ea15ee48eGroup ID: 3717f7fa-3758-2174-99a9-8b824262dc82Group Index: 2
                                            • •
                                              348.Origin_Intro_Laezel: I was afforded a destiny of my own choosing. When he comes of age, it is only right I give Xan the same. [End]

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8cc1618d-5829-d877-1755-5159eecc0972Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: hee8d9185g5d52g4691gbf19g7c828cf025caText UUID: 7ffb175d-cb01-4ef6-a131-212a2b058f78Timeline Phase Index: 293Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8cc1618d-5829-d877-1755-5159eecc0972Timeline Phase Duration: 9.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 2End Node: True

                            628.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You say 'stuck' - and still you stay. Your devotion to Karlach knows no bounds. Nor, it seems, does your fortitude.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fc4454b2-1db0-29ba-e1e3-513374b1bf3dSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h81283e8eg7678g48b0g8351gfe152b1cfb92Text UUID: 88d3154d-2f5e-4650-a463-cc40d663d74eTimeline Phase Index: 101Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fc4454b2-1db0-29ba-e1e3-513374b1bf3dTimeline Phase Duration: 12sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                            • See Node 107 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) You impressed me from the beginning, you know. It was my own foolish pride that ever kept me from admitting it - to you, or myself.

                          • +
                            226.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Ah. Well, a harsh 'no' is as reasonable an answer as any. I wasn't always the most... gracious ally. But there's something I'd have you know:

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5e43e584-6cb2-9e2d-2d45-437e3d1aee60Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h7c0c4760g929dg4eddg9c2cg01dc4abfcc09Text UUID: 3af97261-0ed4-4bd2-a083-5ddc74f1af3bTimeline Phase Index: 181Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5e43e584-6cb2-9e2d-2d45-437e3d1aee60Timeline Phase Duration: 29.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 5e43e584-6cb2-9e2d-2d45-437e3d1aee60Group Index: 0

                            241.Origin_Intro_Laezel: And yet you live. Zariel could never hope to slaughter a soul as tremendous as yours.

                        333.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Perhaps you might join us. Help us raze it to the ground, put those godly powers to good use.ORI_Gale_State_IsGodGale

      105.Origin_Intro_Laezel: Chk.note: Not sure she's happy to see you at first, but she comes around. But she starts with her old greeting.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2eab36ee-3530-3ed0-309a-f29ed06adbfdSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Laezel)Text Handle: h05fd298cgec93g461fg87fcga784c575494eText UUID: 6b8f03c1-6543-4ba7-9cc5-950a5e33eb36Timeline Phase Index: 159Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2eab36ee-3530-3ed0-309a-f29ed06adbfdTimeline Phase Duration: 1.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
      • See Node 538 (Origin_Intro_Laezel) I never imagined we'd be standing toe to toe on this day, in this place.
